---
title: "Country Analysis"
---

This page shows trends in life expectancy, GDP per capita, and population of China over time.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
# Load data
df = pd.read_csv("gapminder.csv")

country = "China"
subset = df[df['country'] == country]

fig, ax1 = plt.subplots(figsize=(10,6))

ax1.plot(subset['year'], subset['life_expectancy'], color='blue', marker='o', label='Life Expectancy')
ax1.set_xlabel('Year')
ax1.set_ylabel('Life Expectancy', color='blue')
ax1.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor='blue')

ax2 = ax1.twinx()
ax2.plot(subset['year'], subset['gdp_per_capita'], color='green', marker='x', label='GDP per Capita')
ax2.plot(subset['year'], subset['population_millions'], color='red', marker='s', label='Population')
ax2.set_ylabel('GDP per Capita & Population', color='black')
ax2.tick_params(axis='y', labelcolor='black')

fig.tight_layout()
fig.suptitle(f"{country} Trends Over Time", y=1.05)
ax1.legend(loc='upper left')
ax2.legend(loc='upper right')
plt.show()
```
